name: tripitaka-mcp
title: Tripitaka MCP
description: MCP server for the full Pāli Canon (Tipiṭaka) — ~444K segments at parity with SuttaCentral. Hybrid search (trigram+vector), full-sutta fetch with cross-reference URLs, segment-aligned translation comparison, and Pāli word lookup. Free hosted instance or self-hostable via Docker.
